dungeon: GENUINE ROTF realm-grind / edited compilation ('RuinedBow' PPE — repeated class death screens Level 20 Sorcerer/Archer/Warrior, 'key got stuck :(' death excuse, 'PREVIOUS VIDEO' end cards). Chat readable (no facecam over gameplay). HEADLINE: a rich Marble Colossus taunt set (Latin-flavoured incantations) + its radial-ring attack + the purple-Pillar arena. Plus event-boss flavour (Wind Elemental, The Forgotten King, Mushroom) and a Stheno the Snake Queen sighting (corroborates the just-enriched Stheno).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-minimaps+frames: a mostly OPEN REALM grind (grey/tan minimap, scattered yellow enemy dots) feeding into dungeon arenas. KEY arena = the MARBLE COLOSSUS lair: a dark OVAL/round room with FOUR purple DIAMOND 'Pillar' structures arranged in a square around the central spawn (the destructible Pillars), open floor between them, player fights from centre. A second structured multi-room dungeon (grey block rooms, a marked top room) also traversed. Realm islands are the outer hub.

bosses.name: Marble Colossus
phases: fights amid 4 Pillars ('Enough Pillars, serve your purpose' = Pillar summon/command); a 'slipping into the void' near-death/finale line as it dies
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames: a LARGE RADIAL RING/NOVA of evenly-spaced BLUE/PURPLE bullets (big expanding circle filling the arena) as the signature; plus an ORANGE radial NOVA/STARBURST burst (dense many-count star) in a later/enrage beat; SUMMONS Pillars (the 4 purple structures) that must be cleared. Reconstruct as: radial ring (high count, blue) + orange radial nova on enrage + Pillar summon-adds.
minions: Pillars (4 purple destructible structures around the arena)
taunts: I feel myself... Slipping... Into the void... It is so[on]
SANGUIS...! CAIRO! Feel it rend from your bo[dy]
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured 'Marble Colossus', lines repeated across the fight). Marble Colossus is ALREADY built/enriched in our tree -> these are ENRICHMENT candidates; 'I feel myself... Slipping... Into the void...' and 'PESTIS! The darkness consumes!!' and 'Enough Pillars, serve your purpose' and 'Perish, blights upon this realm!' are clear. 'SANGUIS...! CAIRO! Feel it rend from your bo[dy]' is a CAPS Latin-flavoured incantation, partially uncertain (exact caps words + tail cut) -> mark reconstructed. Verify against the existing Marble Colossus behavior before adding (add only lines not already present).

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: a 'RuinedBow' PPE realm-grind compilation. HEADLINE recovery = Marble Colossus's taunt set (Latin-flavoured incantations: 'PESTIS! The darkness consumes!!', 'SANGUIS...! CAIRO! Feel it rend from your body', the Pillar command 'Enough Pillars, serve your purpose', 'Perish, blights upon this realm!', and the death line 'I feel myself... Slipping... Into the void...') + its DOCUMENTED radial blue-ring / orange-nova attack + the 4-purple-Pillar arena. Stheno the Snake Queen sighted (overlay) corroborating the just-built Stheno enrichment. Realm event bosses (Wind Elemental 'Tornadoes! Help me!', The Forgotten King, Mushroom) add flavour. Heavy Legendary-loot feed + Magic Dust -> Special Dust crafting note.
uncertain: Marble Colossus is the only fully boss-attributable taunt source; the 'SANGUIS...! CAIRO!' caps incantation is partially uncertain (exact caps words + right-edge tail cut) -> reconstructed. Attacks attributed to Marble Colossus from the blue-ring frames are DOCUMENTED but the orange-nova phase could be a different overlapping realm boss in a compilation -> attribution MEDIUM. Event-boss lines (Forgotten King, Mushroom) are right-edge cut stems. Stheno gives no new line here (overlay only). Dungeon names not banner-confirmed (realm grind).
confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH for the Marble Colossus clear taunt lines + the blue radial-ring attack + the purple-Pillar arena (all DOCUMENTED-from-frames/chat, repeated). MEDIUM for the 'SANGUIS...! CAIRO!' caps line (reconstructed) and the orange-nova attribution. GENUINE ROTF. Net value: ENRICHMENT lines for the already-built Marble Colossus (verify-then-add) + a documented attack/arena for it + corroboration of Stheno + realm-event flavour. Best follow-up: a single Lair-of-the-Marble-Colossus clip to complete the 'SANGUIS! CAIRO!' line and isolate the orange-nova phase.
